weeklyLogOffloadRsyncPrivateKey.description: String, default - ''. Private key from k8s Secret object.

purge.description: Boolean, default - false. Removes auditd .deb package and all according files. Set true before HOC deletion.

enabled.description: Boolean, default - false. Enables the auditd role to install the auditd packages and configure rules. CIS rules: 4.1.1.1, 4.1.1.2.

enabledAtBoot.description: Boolean, default - false. Configures grub to audit processes that can be audited even if they start up prior to auditd startup. CIS rule: 4.1.1.3.

backlogLimit.description: Integer, default - none. Configures the backlog to hold records. If during boot audit=1 is configured, the backlog holds 64 records. If more than 64 records are created during boot, auditd records will be lost with a potential malicious activity being undetected. CIS rule: 4.1.1.4.

logGroup.description: String, default - 'root'. log_group parameter for auditd.conf file.

logFilePath.description: String, default - '/var/log/audit/audit.log'. log_file parameter for auditd.conf file.

logFilePerm.description: String, default - '0600'. Linux permissions for logFilePath file.

maxLogFile.description: Integer, default - 8. Configures the maximum size in MB of the audit log file. Once the log reaches the maximum size, it is rotated and a new log file is created. CIS rule: 4.1.2.1.

maxLogFileAction.description:
String, default - none. Defines handling of the audit log file reaching the maximum file size.
- keep_logs: rotate logs but never delete them.
- rotate: add a cron job to compress rotated log files and keep maximum 5 compressed files.
- compress: compress log files and keep them under the /var/log/auditd/ directory. Requires auditd_max_log_file_keep to be enabled.
CIS rule: 4.1.2.2.

maxLogFileKeep.description: Integer, default - 5. Defines the number of compressed log files to keep under the /var/log/auditd/ directory. Requires auditd_max_log_file_action=compress.

mayHaltSystem.description: Boolean, default - false. Halts the system when the audit logs are full. Applies the following configuration: space_left_action=email, action_mail_acct=root, admin_space_left_action=halt. CIS rule: 4.1.2.3.

customRules.description: String, default - none. Base64-encoded content of the 60-custom.rules file for any architecture.

presetRules.description: String, default - 'all,!immutable'. Comma-separated list of built-in preset rules (access, actions, delete, docker, identity, immutable, logins, mac-policy, modules, mounts, perm-mod, privileged, scope, session, system-locale, time-change). Also supports groups (ubuntu-cis-rules, docker-cis-rules) and keywords (none, all, !<rule> for exclusions). Since Container Cloud 2.28.0, presetRules supports collecting grouped CIS rules. Example: 'all,!immutable,!sessions' enables all rules except immutable and sessions.

auditdRulesOwner.description: String, default - 'root'. Linux user for .rules files in /etc/audit/rules.d/

auditdRulesGroup.description: String, default - 'root'. Linux group for .rules files in /etc/audit/rules.d/

auditdRulesMode.description: String, default - '0600'. Linux file permissions for .rules files in /etc/audit/rules.d/

remoteUpload.description: Configuration for remote audit log uploading.

enabled.description: Enables remote uploading of audit logs.

server.description: The remote server address to receive audit logs.

port.description: The port number of the remote server.

weeklyLogOffload.description: STIG Compliance: UBTU-24-900950 configuration for offloading audit logs to an external location weekly via rsync snapshots.

enabled.description: Boolean, default - false. Enables the crontab script execution to offload audit events weekly.

rsyncDest.description: String. Required if enabled. The destination directory target path on the local or remote system.

rsyncRemoteUser.description: String, optional. The SSH username used to authenticate against the remote log receiver target (e.g., 'ubuntu').

rsyncRemoteHost.description: String, optional. The network address or hostname of the remote log receiver endpoint (e.g., '172.19.120.25').

rsyncAdditionalArgs.description: String, default - ''. Allows passing arbitrary extra rsync arguments or engine flags directly to the backup line execution (e.g., --bwlimit=5000).

rsyncSSHAdditionalArgs.description: String, default - ''. Allows passing arbitrary extra rsync arguments or engine flags directly to the backup line execution (e.g., --bwlimit=5000).
